seoTitle: Monjingup vs Moodiarrup — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Monjingup and Moodiarrup. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Monjingup and Moodiarrup.
heading: Monjingup vs Moodiarrup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Monjingup, Western Australia and Moodiarrup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Monjingup has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Moodiarrup (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Monjingup or Moodiarrup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Monjingup has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Moodiarrup scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Monjingup scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Moodiarrup scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Monjingup or Moodiarrup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Monjingup has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.08% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
